prompts.title: AI Prompts
prompts.description: Here you'll find some ready-to-use prompts for your everyday work
prompts.uploadPhotoNotice: Upload your photo with this prompt
prompts.genderRequired: Choose a version to copy the prompt
prompts.selectGenderPlaceholder: Select Feminine or Masculine to see the prompt
prompts.fillRequired: Fill in all fields to copy

chatgpt-no-pain-no-gain.title: No Pain, No Gain
chatgpt-no-pain-no-gain.description: Transform your gym photo into a fun, illustrated artwork with chibi mini versions of yourself and motivational handwritten phrases.
chatgpt-no-pain-no-gain.textFeminine:
Edit the image while keeping the original photo completely unchanged — including the person, face, body, pose, lighting, and gym background.

Add multiple small, cute chibi-style "mini versions" of the person around the image. Each mini character should have a big head, expressive facial features, and match hairstyle and outfit.

Depict each mini version doing different gym-related activities:
one cheering with arms raised
one running in running shoes
one drinking from a shaker bottle
one wearing sporty running glasses
one climbing near her leg

Enhance the image with playful, hand-drawn doodles and handwritten notes in white and ocean pink ink, in a scrapbook style. Include elements like arrows, stars, hearts, sparkles, and sketchy lines.

Add cute, handwritten gym-themed motivational phrases:
"lift strong"
"stronger every rep"
"no pain no gain"
"sweat now, shine later"
"progress over perfection"
"train hard, stay soft"

The overall vibe should feel fun, energetic and feminine.
chatgpt-no-pain-no-gain.textMasculine:
Edit the image while keeping the original photo completely unchanged — including the person, face, body, pose, lighting, and gym background.

Add multiple small, stylized chibi-style "mini versions" of the person around the image. Each mini character should have a slightly exaggerated head, confident expressions, and match the hairstyle and outfit.

Depict each mini version doing different gym-related activities:
one hyping up with a strong, pumped pose
one sprinting with intensity
one drinking from a shaker bottle
one wearing sporty performance sunglasses
one climbing or gripping near his leg like a determined mini athlete

Enhance the image with bold, hand-drawn doodles and handwritten notes in white and deep blue tones, in a dynamic, sketchbook style. Include elements like sharp arrows, impact lines, stars, lightning bolts, and rough sketch accents.

Add strong, handwritten gym-themed motivational phrases:
"lift heavy"
"stronger every rep"
"no excuses"
"earn your strength"
"progress over perfection"
"stay disciplined"

The overall vibe should feel powerful, energetic, and driven.

chatgpt-child-and-actual.title: Child & Present Me
chatgpt-child-and-actual.description: Create a stunning side-by-side photorealistic portrait of your child self and your present self, connected by a calm and emotional gaze.
chatgpt-child-and-actual.text:
Create a picture with the following details:
On the left: a child version of me looking with an innocent smile to the right, with [YEAR OF BIRTH] written above wearing a light grey tshirt and blue jeans.
On the right: A present version of me (match face) sits with her hands under her chin and looks at the child with a calm smile, with "2026" written above. Wearing a white tshirt and blue jeans.
Studio background: plain and soft (studio background)
The lighting: Soft, cinematic, warm (even a black-and-white photo). Style: Professional, minimal, emotional photography, focusing on feelings and visual communication between the two versions.
Make the picture look so real like a real photoshoot.
Keep my original features without changing.
photo size 4:5

chatgpt-hairstyle.title: Hairstyle Analysis
chatgpt-hairstyle.description: Analyze hairstyles and find the best combinations for your portrait.
chatgpt-hairstyle.text: Create a hairstyle analysis chart using this portrait. Show side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Make it visual first, with only short labels and no paragraphs.

chatgpt-color-analysis.title: Personal Color Analysis
chatgpt-color-analysis.description: Analyze colors and find the best combinations for your portrait.
chatgpt-color-analysis.text: Using this portrait, create a personal color analysis with a diagram first. Show which clothing colors suit the subject well through visual comparison. Keep the text minimal and avoid paragraphs.

chatgpt-action-figure.title: Action Figure
chatgpt-action-figure.description: Transform yourself into a custom action figure. Get a professional toy design with personalized details.
chatgpt-action-figure.text: Draw an action figure of this person in the photo, the toy should be full figure wearing the same clothes, on the top of the box saying [YOUR NAME]. The accessories of the figure next to it: [ACCESSORIES THAT YOU WANT]. This figure should look like a premium toy and everything should be inside the plastic.

chatgpt-isometric-studio.title: Isometric Music Studio
chatgpt-isometric-studio.description: Create a dreamy isometric illustration of your personal music studio inside a synthesizer.
chatgpt-isometric-studio.text:
Minimalist isometric 3D illustration of a cozy, happy dreamy music studio inside a synthesizer. The exterior features classic details and futuristic elements, all rendered in earthy tones with vibrant, beautiful colors.

Inside the synthesizer, a young person like the photo that I send you, sits drawing on a tablet.

Next to him is a vintage shelf with [ITEMS THAT YOU WANT], adds a brightening effect to what is nearby. The entire scene is rendered in a warm style with shadows. And dramatic lighting, subtle perspective and cozy vibes - perfect for fans of digital art and futuristic, with a light 3D touch and a slightly plasticized feel to everything the entire scene should resemble a diorama.

chatgpt-instagram-children-draw.title: Children's Crayon Drawing
chatgpt-instagram-children-draw.description: Transform any photo into a charming crayon-style drawing that looks like it was made by a 10-year-old child, full of cute and playful details.
chatgpt-instagram-children-draw.text:
Edit the provided image and reimagine the entire scene as a crayon-style drawing. Simplify the details and make it look like it was drawn by a 10-year-old child
Do not use the original image's colors. Give it the feeling of being drawn on a sheet of white paper, with a very cute, playful, and innocent look. Add charming childlike elements such as flowers, candy, stars, clouds, and other sweet decorative details to enhance the whimsical feel
Keep the overall result adorable, colorful, and full of childlike innocence.
